starter.valueUnlock: Open-source and local runs stay completely free. Upgrade when you need CI enforcement and quotas.

individual.audience: Solo engineers running verification in CI
individual.valueUnlock: Verification in CI with licensed npm, locks, enforce, and included monthly quota.

team.valueUnlock: Same paid features with more monthly verifications for shared CI.

business.valueUnlock: Higher quota when you verify across several services or busy pipelines.

enterprise.audience: Procurement, custom limits, on-prem, or locked-down environments
enterprise.valueUnlock: Sales-led onboarding with tailored contract terms.
